Export.Routine: DVPIAM ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform XUS IAM Wrapper Functions;1/27/2016 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****;October 1, 2015;Build 35 ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; IAMAU^XUESSO3 6290 ; IAMDU^XUESSO3 6289 ; IAMEU^XUESSO3 6291 ; IAMFU^XUESSO3 6288 ; IAMRU^XUESSO3 6293 ; IAMTU^XUESSO3 6292 Q ; ;--------- Private Methods used only by DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM ---------- ; ; IAMAU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Add User N X,R,NAME,SECID,EMAIL,ADUPN,SSN,DOB,STATION,AUTHCODE F X="NAME","SECID","EMAIL","ADUPN","SSN","DOB","STATION","AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D IAMAU^XUESSO3(.R,NAME,SECID,EMAIL,ADUPN,SSN,DOB,STATION,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Add User"),"IAM Add User") Q S @TARGET@("results","DUZ")=$P(R(0),U) S @TARGET@("results","STATION")=$P(R(0),U,2) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; IAMEU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Edit User N R,INARRY,AUTHCODE F X="AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) M INARRY=@SOURCE@("INARRY") D IAMEU^XUESSO3(.R,.INARRY,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Edit User"),"IAM Edit User") Q S @TARGET@("results","DUZ")=R(0) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; IAMDU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Display User N X,R,DISPDUZ,AUTHCODE F X="DISPDUZ","AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D IAMDU^XUESSO3(.R,DISPDUZ,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Display User"),"IAM Display User") Q M @TARGET@("results")=R Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; IAMFU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Find User N X,R,NAME,SSN,DOB,ADUPN,SECID,AUTHCODE F X="NAME","SSN","DOB","ADUPN","SECID","AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D IAMFU^XUESSO3(.R,NAME,SSN,DOB,ADUPN,SECID,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Find User"),"IAM Find User") Q M @TARGET@("results")=R Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; IAMRU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Reactivate User N X,R,SECID,AUTHCODE F X="SECID","AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D IAMRU^XUESSO3(.R,SECID,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Reactivate User"),"IAM Reactivate User") Q S @TARGET@("results","DUZ")=R(0) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; IAMTU(SOURCE,TARGET) ; IAM Terminate User N X,R,SECID,TERMDATE,TERMRESN,AUTHCODE F X="SECID","TERMDATE","TERMRESN","AUTHCODE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) D IAMTU^XUESSO3(.R,SECID,TERMDATE,TERMRESN,AUTHCODE) I +R(0)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,$S(R(1)]"":R(1),1:"Unable to Terminate User"),"IAM Terminate User") Q S @TARGET@("results","DUZ")=R(0) Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL()
